evidence.snippet: We offer a wide range of gyro-stabilized EO/IR/LRF payloads for various aerial platforms – from military UAVs and fixed-wing drones to light manned aircraft, helicopters, and commercial multirotors. UAS Components' camera systems deliver exceptional image quality, precise targeting, and stable performance under real-world conditions.
USG-405 EO/IR/LRF ISR gimbal

items.notes: Gyro-stabilized EO/IR/LRF gimbals (USG series) are the flagship product line

evidence.snippet: Solutions for efficient and rapid UAV launch (up to 40 kg takeoff weight) and safe drone recovery in all conditions and weather.

evidence.snippet:
These Pitot tubes are specifically designed for UAVs operating in harsh climatic conditions. With integrated heating, they ensure accurate pressure readings in fog, low temperatures, and prevent icing during flight.
[](/pitot-tubes/heated-pitot-tube)

items.notes: Heated pitot tubes specifically designed for UAVs in harsh conditions

evidence.snippet:
Batteries
---------
All our batteries deliver stable performance and long operational life across a wide range of use cases — from UAVs to backup power systems. Need a custom configuration? We offer battery development services tailored to your technical requirements and mission-specific needs.

items.notes: Multiple UAV battery families plus custom battery development

evidence.snippet:
### Aerowatcher Software
A civilian-grade software suite for UAV camera and sensor control. Aerowatcher enables intuitive payload operation, real-time situational monitoring, and mission report generation.

items.notes: Aerowatcher software and Video Processing and Stabilization Software

products_categories.notes: Primary business is ISR camera/gimbal payloads for UAVs; also offers launch/recovery systems, antennas, pitot tubes, batteries, and software. Launch catapult systems don't map to a single defined category cleanly — listed under recovery_systems alongside parachutes since the site groups them together.

evidence.snippet: Ukrainian Manufacturing at Global Standards

We maintain strict quality control from engineering to assembly. All components are manufactured in Ukraine, enabling flexible logistics, rapid service support, and cost-effective pricing without unnecessary markups. Production facilities are decentralized and hardened, ensuring uninterrupted output even during wartime operations.

headquarters.notes: Phone number +38 country code (Ukraine) on contacts page; homepage explicitly states all components manufactured in Ukraine. No city disclosed on site.

evidence.snippet: Advanced camera systems, high-grade components, mission-critical accessories, and expert services for UAVs – from prototype stages to full-scale production.

We provide a wide range of gyro-stabilized EO/IR/LRF payloads for various aerial platforms including military drones, fixed-wing UAVs, light manned aircraft, helicopters, and commercial multicopters.UAS Components camera systems deliver exceptional image quality, precise targeting, and stable performance.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Sells major UAV subsystems: gyro-stabilized EO/IR/LRF gimbal payloads, catapult launchers, parachute recovery systems, antenna trackers, batteries, pitot tubes, and software. Does not manufacture complete UAV platforms.

products.notes: Many named SKUs across camera, launch/recovery, antenna, pitot tube, battery, and software categories. Silvus radios appear to be resold. Some product pages were skipped.

ndaa.notes: Ukrainian manufacturer; no mention of NDAA compliance anywhere in the corpus.

blue_uas.notes: No mention of Blue UAS or Blue sUAS anywhere in the corpus.

evidence.snippet: We maintain strict quality control from engineering to assembly. readiness.notes: Catalog SKUs with part numbers (e.g. UASC.B220.000.00-01), decentralized hardened production facilities operational during wartime. Homepage tagline covers 'prototype stages to full-scale production' but refers to customer use cases, not their own maturity.

unresolved_questions: No city-level headquarters address disclosed on site — only country (Ukraine) confirmed
Silvus StreamCaster 4200/4400 radios appear to be resold (not self-manufactured); full resale vs. integration scope unclear
About-us page was skipped (class budget exhausted); may contain additional company info

fetch_requests.reason: Would confirm headquarters city, founding details, and company background — currently skipped_class_budget
Would list full antenna tracker product line and confirm whether Silvus radios are resold or integrated

tagline: Ukrainian manufacturer of gyro-stabilized EO/IR/LRF gimbals (USG series, 300–1.1 kg), catapult launchers, parachute recovery systems, antenna trackers, and video processing units. Field-deployed in Ukrainian military operations. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; no confirmed US prime contracts in public record.
